'''Dustrose''' was the name given to the [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Dark Acolyte/Legends|Dark Acolyte]] serving alongside [[Nikkos Tyris]] by [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Ylenic It'kla]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Formerly a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]], Dustrose fell to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]] after a failed mission to [[Baltizaar/Legends|Baltizaar]] and eventually joined the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] after founding the [[Jensaarai/Legends|Jensaarai]].

==Biography==
Discovered at an early age to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Dustrose was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] at the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order's]] largest [[Jedi academy|academy]], the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] Ascending to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]], Dustrose was dispatched to [[Baltizaar/Legends|Baltizaar]] with a task force of other Knights assigned to wipe out the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side cult]] known as the [[Bando Gora/Legends|Bando Gora]]. However, the Jedi were outmatched by the dark-siders and most were slain; the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] believed Dustrose to be among the casualties. However, she survived and joined fellow survivor [[Nikkos Tyris]] in falling to the dark side and traveling with the [[Anzat (species)|Anzati]] Jedi's group to [[Susevfi]].<ref name="IJ" />

On Susevfi, Tyris led his followers down the path to the dark side, studying an ancient ancient [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] manuscript to learn their dark techniques. The cult, which Tyris dubbed the [[Jensaarai/Legends|Jensaarai]], would grow into a large enough threat to cause the Jedi High Council and the secret [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lords of the Sith]] concern. As the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Dustrose continued to stay loyal to Tyris. The group was approached by [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]], leader of the Confederacy and the alter ego of [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Dooku/Legends|Darth Tyranus]]. Dooku gifted Tyris with a [[Sith holocron/Legends|Sith holocron]] favored by former Anzati Jedi [[Volfe Karkko]] and convinced the cult leader to join the Separatist war effort. Granting the Jensaarai members the title of [[Dark Acolyte/Legends|Dark Acolytes]] within the ranks of the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]], Dustrose was stationed with Tyris on Susevfi during the final days of the war.<ref name="IJ" />

A month before the war would end, the Jedi Order dispatched the Knights [[Nejaa Halcyon]], [[Ylenic It'kla]], and ''[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Desertwind]]'' to remove the Jensaarai leadership. Attacking their fortress on Susevfi, the Jedi engaged Tyris, Dustrose, and [[Sukarr|another loyal follower]], in an attempt to remove the Jensaari from the war. Over the course of the fighting, all three Jensaarai fell, with Jedi It'kla delivering the fatal blow to Dustrose.<ref name="IJ" />
